items.brief: BitGo, OTC Markets enable tokenized securities trading for broker-dealers
items.why: Alliance expands custody infrastructure for digital asset securities settlement onchain.

items.brief: UK digital gilt pilot needs onchain stablecoin to unlock market liquidity
items.why: Stablecoin required as settlement mechanism for tokenized government bonds.

items.brief: Tokenized equity trading reaches $470 billion monthly volume in RWA sector
items.why: Demonstrates scale of tokenized equity adoption as core RWA asset class.

items.brief: Kraken's xStocks expands tokenized equities to Hong Kong, UK, South Korea
items.why: Global expansion of tokenized equity offerings across major markets.

items.brief: Balance stablecoin collapses after bitcoin price manipulation exploit
items.why: Security failure in stablecoin collateral system highlights tokenization risks.

items.brief: BIS warns USD stablecoins can evade capital controls more effectively than deposits
items.why: Regulatory analysis of stablecoin role in cross-border asset movement.

items.brief: Base Layer-2 launching 1:1-backed tokenized equities offering
items.why: Ethereum scaling platform expanding tokenized asset infrastructure.

items.brief: Tether Gold recognized as spot commodity in Abu Dhabi financial center
items.why: Regulatory approval for tokenized commodity asset class adoption.

items.brief: Robinhood's tokenization strategy on Arbitrum could reduce crypto trading reliance
items.why: Digital broker expanding tokenized equities and onchain infrastructure.

items.brief: South Korea's CBDC pilot expands with tokenized bank deposit payment tests
items.why: Central bank advancing tokenized deposit infrastructure for payments.
